codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit `03c9f69a518ce0bb4406b316002e7b870a8073ab` together with the supporting parity-closure diff already on branch (`84b0ca3b478657aa41320b12ed4fdbeeaabb5c76`). The feature stayed within scope: it used the new parity runner to validate the active recovery stack, then closed only the real local parity blockers by tightening `ci/pr_manifests/pr_auth_tenant.txt` and `ci/pr_manifests/pr_business_slice.txt`, adding the delegated truthsuite bridge `TS_RuntimePortalBoundaryDelegatedCoverageTest`, expanding targeted portal and RBAC tests, normalizing `ci/pr_manifests/pr_accounting.txt`, and adding focused `FinishedGoodsReservationEngineTest` replay coverage. The recorded parity reruns for PRs #100, #101, and #102 all passed locally, with PR #102 correctly skipping changed-files coverage because its diff has no runtime source changes. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation issues in the reviewed scope.

summary: Pass. Validated the active recovery stack with the local parity runner and closed the remaining real portal-boundary and final-hardening coverage blockers so PRs #100-#102 now have green local parity evidence, including an explicit no-runtime-diff changed-coverage skip for PR #102.
